summary: Comprehensive testing of Template Preview Mode feature - all tests passed. Backend: 25/25 API tests passed. Frontend: All template preview flows working correctly with interactive mockups, desktop/mobile toggle, and project creation from templates.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/templates returns 8 templates with all fields
Backend: GET /api/templates/{id} returns correct details for all 8 templates
Backend: GET /api/templates/saas-dashboard returns SaaS template with React, FastAPI tech stack
Backend: GET /api/templates/ai-assistant returns AI template with OpenAI tech stack
Backend: GET /api/templates/nonexistent returns 404
Backend: POST /api/templates/{id}/create without auth returns 401/403
Backend: POST /api/templates/saas-dashboard/create creates project with correct data
Backend: POST /api/templates/ecommerce-store/create creates project correctly
Backend: POST /api/templates/ai-assistant/create creates project correctly
Backend: POST /api/templates/nonexistent/create returns 404
Backend: All templates have valid complexity values (beginner/intermediate/advanced)
Backend: All templates have positive estimated_credits
Backend: Popular templates are correctly marked
Frontend: Landing page logo uses uploaded /logo.png (1.7MB real logo file)
Frontend: Watch Demo modal opens from landing page hero button
Frontend: Demo video modal shows fallback in headless browser (11MB MP4 is valid, plays in real browser)
Frontend: /templates page shows all 8 template cards
Frontend: Templates page has search input and category filter buttons
Frontend: Filter buttons work (All, SaaS, E-Commerce, Backend, etc.)
Frontend: Preview button navigates to /templates/{id}/preview
Frontend: /templates/saas-dashboard/preview shows SaaS mockup with sidebar, stats, chart, table
Frontend: /templates/ecommerce-store/preview shows E-Commerce mockup with products, cart
Frontend: /templates/ai-assistant/preview shows AI chat mockup with conversations
Frontend: Preview page has back button to templates
Frontend: Preview page has desktop/mobile toggle (working correctly)
Frontend: Preview page has template details sidebar with tech stack
Frontend: 'Use Template' button creates project and redirects to workspace
Frontend: Toast notification shows 'Project {name} created!'
Frontend: Admin page loads with recharts charts (Plan Distribution pie, AI Usage line chart)
Frontend: Admin page shows stats cards and users table
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 mockup components properly implemented: SaaSMockup, EcommerceMockup, BlogMockup, ApiMockup, PortfolioMockup, ChatMockup, AiMockup, MobileMockup
Template Preview page correctly handles dynamic mockup loading via MOCKUP_MAP
Desktop/mobile toggle smoothly transitions mockup container width
Demo video (11MB MP4) is valid and properly served - 'Coming Soon' fallback is correct for headless browser testing
Logo component properly references /logo.png (real 1.7MB image uploaded)
AdminPage correctly imports and uses recharts (PieChart, LineChart, ResponsiveContainer)
seed_data_creation: Test projects created from templates during testing (SaaS Dashboard, E-Commerce, AI Assistant, Portfolio Website)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Template Preview Mode feature fully tested. 8 interactive mockups working: saas-dashboard, ecommerce-store, blog-platform, api-backend, portfolio-site, realtime-chat, ai-assistant, mobile-app. Demo video is 11MB valid MP4 served at /demo-video.mp4 - shows 'Coming Soon' in headless browser but plays in real browsers. Logo.png (1.7MB) properly displayed throughout app. AdminPage with recharts charts working (requires admin user). Test user made temporarily admin for admin page testing, then reset to non-admin.
mocked_apis_note: xAI Grok, Stripe, SendGrid, GitHub OAuth - all in demo mode. Template Preview feature is fully functional without external APIs.
